site_tagline: web development studio for product and data experiences, based in Berlin
landing_intro: landozone is a Berlin-based studio and partner network building web applications, data products, and digital experiences for teams that need reliable delivery from discovery to launch.
about_p1: We combine full-stack engineering and data science with domain depth in policy and climate. That mix helps us turn complex subject matter into clear, useful products.
about_p2_prefix: We build applications and visualize complex data with modern JavaScript/TypeScript frameworks
about_p2_suffix: as well as Python and R for data analysis.
about_p3: Explore selected projects below to see how we deliver end-to-end, from discovery to implementation.
usp_title: we help you ship the product behind the idea
usp_p1: From marketing sites and content platforms to complex web apps and data-heavy storytelling, we assemble the right mix of design, engineering, and analytics.
usp_p2: You get a clear studio lead on each engagement, backed by specialists we bring in when the scope calls for it — from UX and implementation to ongoing support.
usp_p3: Have a roadmap or a rough brief? We would love to hear what you are building.
contact_intro: Use the contact form or write to us by email. We will follow up to discuss your project and how we can help.
form_success: Thanks! Your email has been sent
form_error: There was an error. Please send a message per email.
blog_meta: some thoughts on web development and other things
projects_meta: explore recent studio work and the technologies we used to build it
projects_search_placeholder: Search by name, client, or tech…
seo_default_alt: logo of the website, a stylized parenthesis and the beginning of a closing tag (less than sign)
